title: Battle Axes
description: Retextures axes to the original Battle Axe textures!
body:
# Battle Axes
Gives axes a battle axe texture as seen in some of the first versions of minecraft.


### The Diamond Axe being held by a player
![Holding the diamond battle axe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca987fc45068b82b86856a80906a6692d7d0e3a4.png)


### All Axe textures
![All Axe textures on item frames](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4a8e1f856b98d481920ee5aca4ee9540c4448ea.png)
